CYA Recreational Soccer

Play With Purpose

Chantilly’s home for youth recreational soccer, ages 4 to 19. Teams do fill up and waitlist most seasons, register now to lock in your child’s spot before they close.

Register For Fall Soccer Contact Us
Why Recreational Soccer

Coached By Your Community

Every CYA team is led by a volunteer, a parent, a neighbor, someone who shows up week after week because they care about the kids on the field, not a paycheck. That's what keeps this game affordable and close to home instead of priced out and reserved for a few. Recreational soccer built by the community, for the community, is worth showing up for. Fall registration is open, and there's a spot on a team for your kid right now.
